title: 'Elqanah #0511
definition:
Elkanah = "God has possessed" or "God has created"

 1) Samuel's father
 2) a ruler in Jerusalem in the time of king Ahaz
 3) one of David's mighty warriors
 4) son of Korah
 5) several Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elkanah = "God has possessed" or "God has created"

 1) Samuel's father
 2) a ruler in Jerusalem in the time of king Ahaz
 3) one of David's mighty warriors
 4) son of Korah
 5) several Levites

    NASB:  God has created, or God has taken possession, the name of several Isr.
